info.title: CloudWatch Logs Fetcher
info.description: Fetches and filters application logs from AWS CloudWatch Logs

get.description: Searches CloudWatch Logs for entries matching a filter pattern within a time range. Use this when the user asks about errors, exceptions, warnings, or any application-level issues visible in logs. Available log groups: /eks/3tier/pods (us-east-1) for pod-level application logs from the 3-tier microservices frontend and backend, /aws/eks/project-eks/cluster (us-east-1) for Kubernetes control plane logs.

parameters.name: filter_pattern
parameters.description: The search pattern to filter logs. Examples: ERROR, 503, timeout, connection refused, OutOfMemory, Unauthorized, Failed

parameters.name: log_group_name
parameters.description: The CloudWatch Log Group name. Use /eks/3tier/pods for 3-tier application pod logs. Use /aws/eks/project-eks/cluster for Kubernetes control plane logs.

parameters.name: hours_back
parameters.description: How many hours back to search. Use 1 for recent issues, 6 for trends, 24 for daily patterns.

parameters.name: region
parameters.description: AWS region where the logs are stored. Use us-east-1 for EKS pod logs (/eks/3tier/pods) and control plane logs (/aws/eks/project-eks/cluster).
